zh.Thurland, Lancashire, England: 英國藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh.lifeSummary: 當Anne Pennington於大約1430年出生在英國藍卡爾時，她的父親Sir John Pennington I39歲，母親Katherine Tunstall37歲。她於大約1445年與Sir Christopher II Curwen結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1485年在英國波藍德沃爾金頓享年57歲，埋葬在英國波藍德沃爾金頓。

zh-hans.Thurland, Lancashire, England: 英国藍卡爾瑟藍德 卡素
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anne Pennington于大约1430年出生在英国藍卡爾时，她的父亲Sir John Pennington I39岁，母亲Katherine Tunstall37岁。她于大约1445年与Sir Christopher II Curwen结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1485年在英国波藍德沃爾金頓享年57岁，埋葬在英国波藍德沃爾金頓。

nameMeanings.name: Pennington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: habitational name from Pennington in Furness (Lancashire), which derives from Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn ‘farmstead, estate’, or from Pennington in Leigh (Lancashire), which probably derives from the Old English personal name Pinna + the Old English groupname suffix -ingas (genitive -inga-) + Old English tūn.
habitational name from Pennington (Hampshire), or from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hampshire); see   Penton  . All have the same etymology as Pennington in Furness; see 1 above.

variants.name: Penington
meanings: English (Lancashire): variant of   Pennington  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.
History: Edward Penington, born in 1667 in Amersham, Buckinghamshire, England, was appointed surveyor-general of the province of PA in 1698 and accompanied William Penn to Philadelphia.

variants.name: Penton
meanings: habitational name from Penton Grafton or Penton Mewsey (both Hanmpshire), or from a shortened form of Pennington 2. The placenames denoted a farm or estate for which a penny tax was payable (Old English pening ‘penny’ + tūn).
in north-west England, a shortened form of   Pennington   1, from either of the places called Pennington in Lancashire.

nameMeanings.name: Anne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

variants.name: Anni
meanings: Pet form of   Ann   or   Anne .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Anne Pennington was born about 1430, in Lancashire, England, her father, Sir John Pennington I, was 39 and her mother, Katherine Tunstall, was 37. She married Sir Christopher II Curwen about 1445. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. She died about 1485, in Workington, Cumberland, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Workington, Cumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anne Pennington est née environ 1430, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pennington I, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Katherine Tunstall, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Christopher II Curwen environ 1445. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1485, à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Workington, Cumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anne Pennington um 1430 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Pennington I 39 und ihre Mutter Katherine Tunstall 37. Sie hat um 1445 Sir Christopher II Curwen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb um 1485 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Workington, Cumberland, England und wurde in Workington, Cumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pennington è nata il circa 1430 nel Lancashire, England, sua padre, Sir John Pennington I, aveva 39 anni e sua madre, Katherine Tunstall, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Sir Christopher II Curwen circa 1445. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Morì circa 1485, nel Workington, Cumberland, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Workington, Cumberland, England.

ja.Workington, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントン
ja.Muncaster, Cumberland, England: イギリスクウンバーランドムンカスター
ja.Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイア
ja.Thurland, Lancashire, England: イギリスランカシュアイアスウルランド カストル
ja.lifeSummary: Anne Penningtonが約1430年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Pennington Iは39歳，母Katherine Tunstallは37歳であった。約1445年にSir Christopher II Curwenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1485年にイギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンで57歳で死去し，イギリスクウンバーランドウオルキントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Anne Pennington(이)가 대략 1430년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Pennington I(은)는 39세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Tunstall(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1445년 Sir Christopher II Curwen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1485년 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 c벌랜드 워킨그턴에 묻혔다.

mg.about 1430–about 1485: tany ho any amin'ny 1430–tany ho any amin'ny 1485

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anne Pennington nasceu aproximadamente 1430, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Pennington I, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Tunstall, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Christopher II Curwen aproximadamente 1445. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1485, em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anne Pennington родилась около 1430 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Pennington I было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Katherine Tunstall, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Christopher II Curwen около 1445 г. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. Она умерла около 1485 г. в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности воркингтон, кумбирланд, Англия.

sm.about 1430–about 1485: e tusa o le 1430–e tusa o le 1485

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anne Pennington nació aproximadamente 1430, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Pennington I, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Katherine Tunstall, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Sir Christopher II Curwen aproximadamente 1445. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1485, en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Workington, Cumberland, Inglaterra.
